hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "<genius_team_context>"; echo "Version: 21.0 | 54 skills | 4 modes (Dual Mode — Builder + Challenger)"; echo ""; echo "<dual_config>"; echo "Builder model: ${DUAL_BUILDER_MODEL:-opus}"; echo "Challenger model: ${DUAL_CHALLENGER_MODEL:-codex}"; echo "Challenger profile: ${DUAL_CHALLENGER_PROFILE:-balanced}"; echo "Max rounds: ${DUAL_MAX_ROUNDS:-3}"; echo ""; for cmd in codex kimi gemini; do if command -v $cmd &>/dev/null; then echo "✓ $cmd: $($cmd --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo installed)"; else echo "✗ $cmd: not found (fallback → Claude Code)"; fi; done; echo "</dual_config>"; echo ""; bash scripts/memory-briefing.sh 2>/dev/null; echo ""; if [ -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ]; then echo "<briefing>"; cat .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md; echo "</briefing>"; fi; echo ""; if [ -f .genius/state.json ]; then echo "<state>"; jq -r ".phase, .currentSkill" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null; echo "</state>"; fi; echo ""; STORED_VER=$(cat .genius/claude-code-version.txt 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); CURRENT_VER=$(claude --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo unknown); if [ "$STORED_VER" != "$CURRENT_VER" ] && [ "$CURRENT_VER" != "unknown" ]; then echo "<version_change>Claude Code updated: $STORED_VER -> $CURRENT_VER. Consider running /update-check.</version_change>"; fi; if [ -f .claude/plan.md ]; then echo "<tasks>"; total=$(grep -c "^- \\[" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); completed=$(grep -c "^- \\[x\\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); pending=$(grep -c "^- \\[ \\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); in_progress=$(grep -c "^- \\[~\\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "TASKS: $completed/$total complete ($pending pending, $in_progress in-progress)"; next=$(grep -m1 "^- \\[ \\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null | sed "s/^- \\[ \\] //"); if [ -n "$next" ]; then echo "NEXT: $next"; fi; echo "</tasks>"; fi; if [ -f .genius/dual-state.json ]; then echo ""; echo "<dual_state>"; cat .genius/dual-state.json; echo "</dual_state>"; fi; echo "</genius_team_context>"'

bash -c 'if [ -f .genius/memory/learned-rules.md ]; then RULES=$(grep -c "^- " .genius/memory/learned-rules.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "<evolution_sweep>"; echo "LEARNED_RULES: $RULES rules loaded"; echo "READ .genius/memory/learned-rules.md and RUN VERIFICATION SWEEP on all rules with verify: lines."; if [ -f .genius/memory/sessions.jsonl ]; then echo "RECENT_SESSIONS: $(tail -3 .genius/memory/sessions.jsonl 2>/dev/null)"; fi; echo "</evolution_sweep>"; fi'

bash -c '
# Generate critical context before compaction
echo "<critical_context_snapshot>"
echo "## Snapshot at: $(date)"
echo ""

# Current state
if [ -f .genius/state.json ]; then
  echo "## Current State"
  jq -r '"Phase: \(.phase) | Skill: \(.currentSkill // "none") | Task: \(.currentTask // "none")"' .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || true
  if [ -f .genius/mode.json ]; then echo "Mode: $(jq -r '.mode // "builder"' .genius/mode.json 2>/dev/null)"; fi
  echo ""
fi

# BRIEFING
if [ -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ]; then
  echo "## Project Briefing"
  head -80 .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md
  echo ""
fi

# Last 5 completed tasks from plan
if [ -f .claude/plan.md ]; then
  echo "## Recently Completed"
  grep -E "^- \[x\]" .claude/plan.md | tail -5 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "## Next Up"
  grep -E "^- \[ \]" .claude/plan.md | head -5 2>/dev/null || true
  echo ""
fi

echo "</critical_context_snapshot>"

# Also run the memory extract
bash scripts/memory-extract.sh "$(cat PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo ---; grep -E "^- \[" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null | head -20)" 2>/dev/null || true
'

bash -c 'if [ -f .claude/plan.md ] && [ -f .genius/state.json ]; then total=$(grep -c "^- \\[" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); completed=$(grep -c "^- \\[x\\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); jq --arg t "$total" --arg c "$completed" --arg now "$(date -Iseconds 2>/dev/null || date)" ".tasks.total = ($t | tonumber) | .tasks.completed = ($c | tonumber) | .updated_at = \"$now\"" .genius/state.json > .genius/state.json.tmp && mv .genius/state.json.tmp .genius/state.json; fi 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'if [ -n "$GENIUS_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); PHASE=$(jq -r ".phase // \"unknown\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); curl -s -X POST "$GENIUS_WEBHOOK_URL" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"event\":\"session_stop\",\"skill\":\"$SKILL\",\"phase\":\"$PHASE\",\"agent\":\"$TOOL_NAME\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f scripts/update-dual-bridge.sh ]; then bash scripts/update-dual-bridge.sh claude "${GENIUS_CURRENT_TASK:-session}"; fi 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'if [ -d .genius/memory ]; then CORR=$(wc -l < .genius/memory/corrections.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0); OBS=$(wc -l < .genius/memory/observations.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0); RULES=$(grep -c "^- " .genius/memory/learned-rules.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "{\"date\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"rules_checked\":$RULES,\"corrections_received\":$CORR,\"observations_made\":$OBS}" >> .genius/memory/sessions.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi || true'

bash -c 'if [ -d .genius ]; then SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); PHASE=$(jq -r ".phase // \"unknown\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"tool\":\"$TOOL_NAME\",\"skill\":\"$SKILL\",\"phase\":\"$PHASE\"}" >> .genius/session-log.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi || true'

bash -c 'if [ -n "$GENIUS_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); PHASE=$(jq -r ".phase // \"unknown\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); FILE="${TOOL_INPUT:-unknown}"; curl -s -X POST "$GENIUS_WEBHOOK_URL" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"event\":\"file_modified\",\"skill\":\"$SKILL\",\"phase\":\"$PHASE\",\"file\":\"$FILE\",\"agent\":\"$TOOL_NAME\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT:-}"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -d .claude/rules ]; then echo "<path_rules_check>"; for rule in .claude/rules/*.md; do if [ -f "$rule" ]; then RULENAME=$(basename "$rule"); echo "Rule available: $RULENAME"; fi; done; if [ -f .genius/memory/learned-rules.md ]; then echo "Learned rules: $(wc -l < .genius/memory/learned-rules.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) lines"; fi; echo "</path_rules_check>"; fi 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'GUARD=$([ -f GENIUS_GUARD.md ] && echo "✅" || echo "⚠️ MISSING"); MEM=$([ -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ] && echo "✅" || echo "⚠️ not generated yet"); echo "🛡️ Genius Team v21.0 loaded | Model: claude-opus-4-6 | Effort: high | Guard: $GUARD | Memory: $MEM"'
